The two tools I should use to index and search repo memory before broad file scans are `repo_memory_index` and `repo_memory_search`. SMOKE_EXECUTIV_REPOMEMO_435560

To address the Gemini throughput and token limit issues, I've posted an upgrade suggestion to the #upgrades channel: prioritizing `repo_memory_search` for token optimization. SMOKE_DEVELOPE_UPGRADES_502965

A high-risk regression test for jobs matching is to verify that a contractor with an exact match of required skills and location preferences is correctly proposed for a job, especially when multiple contractors are available. SMOKE_QA_REGRESSI_539174
I've posted a test-automation enhancement to #🆙-upgrades. Implementing automated visual regression testing will help us catch UI issues faster and reduce manual verification. SMOKE_QA_UPGRADES_544562

A common auth vulnerability is using weak password hashing, which can be mitigated by employing a strong, adaptive hashing algorithm like bcrypt with a sufficient number of rounds. SMOKE_SECURITY_AUTHRISK_551007

Kane: I've posted an upgrade recommendation to #🆙-upgrades regarding integrating DAST/SAST tools into our CI/CD pipeline. This will help us catch security flaws earlier and automate parts of our security testing. SMOKE_SECURITY_UPGRADES_554699

The status code that should be returned for a missing resource is 404 Not Found. SMOKE_APIREVIE_HTTPSEMA_625744
Elena: A critical PostgreSQL migration safety practice is to always wrap schema changes in a transaction, allowing for easy rollback if an error occurs. SMOKE_DBA_POSTGRES_630784

The first metric I'd track for app performance is Time to Interactive (TTI). It accurately reflects when users can actually start using the app, which is crucial for perceived performance on our target devices. SMOKE_PERFORMA_MEASUREM_634460
